memberdef.name: HalfbandDecimatorDp_getset
memberdef.initializer: = { { "rate", (getter)HbDecimDp_rate, NULL, "Output-to-input rate ratio.", NULL }, { "num_taps", (getter)HbDecimDp_num_taps, NULL, "FIR branch tap count.", NULL }, { NULL } }

memberdef.initializer: = { { "reset", (PyCFunction)HalfbandDecimatorDp_reset, METH_NOARGS, NULL }, { "execute", (PyCFunction)HalfbandDecimatorDp_execute, METH_VARARGS, NULL }, { "__enter__", (PyCFunction)HbDecimDp_enter, METH_NOARGS, NULL }, { "__exit__", (PyCFunction)HbDecimDp_exit, METH_VARARGS, NULL }, { NULL } }

memberdef.name: HalfbandDecimatorDpType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT (NULL, 0).tp_name = "resample.HalfbandDecimatorDp", .tp_basicsize = sizeof (HalfbandDecimatorDpObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)HalfbandDecimatorDp_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "HbDecimDp(h) — C-library halfband 2:1 decimator (CF32→CF32).", .tp_methods = HalfbandDecimatorDp_methods, .tp_getset = HalfbandDecimatorDp_getset, .tp_new = HalfbandDecimatorDp_new, .tp_init = (initproc)HalfbandDecimatorDp_init, }
